citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:20am on
Thursday, March 26, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee at the residence but was informed by a family
member the licensee was not available. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a
violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:20am on 
Thursday, March 26, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee at the residence but was informed by a family 
member the licensee was not available. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a 
violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
